diagrams.title: Functional Dependency Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship X→Y where X determines Y
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how one set of attributes uniquely determines another set

diagrams.title: Attribute Closure Algorithm Flowchart
elements: If Y ⊆ X+ then add Z
diagrams.purpose: Understand the iterative process for computing attribute closure

diagrams.title: Key Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between superkeys, candidate keys, and primary key
diagrams.purpose: Clarify the hierarchy and differences between key types

diagrams.title: Lossless Join Verification Table
diagrams.description: Chase method for testing lossless decomposition
elements: Table with rows for each decomposed relation
Marks: 'a' for relation attributes, 'b' for others
diagrams.purpose: Visual method to verify if decomposition preserves all information
